title: dasystephana frigida
intro: Dasystephana frigida, also known as the Himalayan mint or cold-loving dasystephana, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Dasystephana frigida include relief from digestive issues, colds, and flu, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or essential oils, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
